title: Amscan 991365-05 - Orange Fringed Foil Balloon Weight - 170g
features: Orange balloon weight with a pretty fringed foil finish.
Easily secure helium balloons to a balloon weight or weighted centrepiece to stop your bouquet from floating away.
Simply secure the balloons using balloon or curling ribbon. (Sold separately)
This weight weighs: 170g and can hold up to 10x latex or 12x foil balloons.
description: From the manufacturer About us Amscan truly is one stop wholesale party supply shop - and because we design, manufacture and distribute our own products, we have an unmatched ability to respond quickly to the latest trends, as well as setting a few of our own. Wholesalers and retailers seeking to grow their businesses recognise that Amscan is one of the market leaders in B2B party supplies to the trade and a long-term partner to trust. We have over 12,000 wholesale products, conveniently divided into three core areas: Balloons, Dress-Up and Everyday Party. Within these areas you'll then find a host of seasonal and special event products; from Halloween to Christmas. Taking accountability and ownership where possible, through all areas of our vertically integrated company, we’re putting our corporate responsibility at the front line of thought when designing, manufacturing and distributing our portfolio.
